generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component transforming rotational energy"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for gear transmission"
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control via position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance MotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MABIMAX100Axis1 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with max working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIK840DController, MotorPositionSensor, GearboxPositionSensor, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionSensor
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque from motor current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionDashboardData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed position data for real-time dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentDashboardData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed current data for real-time dashboard visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural description of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural description of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance Simulink_Motor_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for permanent magnet synchronous motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance Simulink_Gearwheel_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for gearwheel behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance Simulink_Gearbox_Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for cycloidal gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into structural model details for SysML"
]

instance DashboardContextInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Contextual understanding of robot operation for operational decisions"
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into friction characteristics used to adjust control algorithms"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control algorithms based on friction model insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for creating and managing SysML models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot axis data for operational decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardContextInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance ControlAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-based control accuracy enhancement through friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin management"
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based modeling for structural description"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for dynamic simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements streamed via MQTT, enabling continuous synchronization between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes), sensors, AAS, SysML and Simulink models, data processing components, and dashboard visualization for unified monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), utilizing live sensor data during robot operation for friction analysis and control improvement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data deviations; white-box and black-box friction models calibrated against real-time operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for industrial asset description and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
